import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let text = io.read_to_end()
  let lines = string.split(text, "\n")
  mut sum = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < lines.len()
    let line = match lines.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end
    let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
    if tokens.len() >= 2
      let tok = match tokens.get(1)
      when Some(s)
        s
      when None
        ""
      end
      let n = match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      sum = sum + n
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("sum=#{sum}")
  Ok(())
end
